feature.name: BaseModel validation and structured ValidationError core
feature.description: Extract Pydantic v1 BaseModel field parsing, validator/root_validator hooks, model Config, and ValidationError error trees without JSON Schema, networks, or settings machinery.
included_behaviors: declare BaseModel subclasses and parse dict input
ValidationError.errors() with loc/type/msg for nested models
excluded_behaviors: original pydantic package import at runtime

entanglement.description: Model validation couples metaclass field setup, validator registries, config inheritance, nested model graphs, and ValidationError flattening.
signals: ModelMetaclass builds fields and validator groups at class creation
nested BaseModel errors require loc prefix merging
root_validator error locations differ from field validators

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import BaseModel, Field, ValidationError, validator, root_validator, Extra
